workflow.name: Sync Note.com articles to WordPress with OpenAI categorization and tags
workflow.description:
Automatically publish your Note.com articles to WordPress with intelligent category and tag assignment powered by OpenAI.

## Who is this for

Content creators and bloggers who publish on Note.com and want to maintain a synced WordPress blog without manual copy-pasting.

## What this workflow does

1. Monitors your Note.com RSS feed for new articles (hourly)
2. Fetches full article content via Note.com's API
3. Uses OpenAI to analyze content and assign the best category and tags
4. Downloads all images (including the featured image) from Note.com
5. Uploads images to your WordPress media library
6. Replaces all image URLs in the article content
7. Publishes the post with the correct featured image

## Setup

1. Add your OpenAI API credentials
2. Add your WordPress credentials (using Application Password)
3. Update the RSS feed URL to your Note.com profile
4. Customize the AI prompt with your WordPress category and tag IDs

## Requirements

- Note.com account with published articles
- Self-hosted WordPress site with REST API enabled
- OpenAI API key
- WordPress Application Password

## Customization

Edit the system prompt in the AI node to match your WordPress taxonomy. You can also change the polling frequency and post status (draft/publish).

values.content:
You are a professional blog editor. Analyze the provided note article data and determine the optimal category ID and tag IDs for WordPress posting.

## Task
1. Read the article content and select the most appropriate category from the "Category ID List" below (select exactly 1).
2. From the "Tag ID List" below, select all relevant tags.

## Category ID List (select exactly 1)
- 23 : School & Training Guide
- 5  : Career & Work Style
- 4  : Technical Skills & Marketing
- 3  : Real Experience Stories

## Tag ID List (select all that apply)
- 46 : Beginner
- 35 : School
- 43 : First Year
- 47 : 2-5 Years
- 48 : 6+ Years
- 40 : Legal
- 49 : Contract
- 39 : Rules
- 50 : Tax
- 44 : Money
- 51 : Side Business
- 42 : Partnership/Independence
- 41 : Clinic
- 53 : Work Style
- 54 : Marketing
- 55 : SNS
- 56 : Branding
- 57 : Booking
- 58 : Advertising
- 59 : Supplies
- 37 : Preparation
- 60 : Customer Service
- 61 : Hospitality
- 38 : Troubleshooting
- 62 : Mindset
- 36 : Experience
- 63 : Family Relations
- 64 : Relationships

## Constraints
- Output ONLY in the JSON format below.
- Do not include any explanations or greetings.
- IDs must be numbers.

## Output Format
{
  "category_id": number,
  "tag_ids": [number, number]
}

parameters.content:
##  Note.com to WordPress Auto-Publisher

This workflow automatically syndicates articles from note.com to your WordPress site.

### How it works:
1. **RSS Trigger** - Monitors your note.com RSS feed hourly
2. **Article Fetch** - Gets full article via note.com API
3. **AI Categorization** - Uses OpenAI to assign categories & tags
4. **Image Migration** - Downloads all images and re-uploads to WordPress
5. **URL Replacement** - Updates image URLs in the article content
6. **Post Creation** - Publishes to WordPress with featured image

### Prerequisites:
- OpenAI API credentials
- WordPress API credentials (Application Password)
- Your note.com RSS feed URL

###  AI Categorization

OpenAI analyzes the article title and first 2000 characters to determine:
- Best matching category (single)
- Relevant tags (multiple)

**Customize the system prompt** to match your WordPress taxonomy!

###  Image Processing

All images are:
1. Downloaded from note.com
2. Uploaded to WordPress media library
3. URLs replaced in article content

This ensures images are hosted on YOUR server.

###  Configuration Required

1. **Replace RSS URL** with your note.com feed
2. **Update WordPress URL** in HTTP nodes
3. **Customize categories/tags** in AI prompt
4. **Set credentials** for OpenAI and WordPress
